design_philosophy: Calm, content-first, no clutter. The UI should feel like a high-end physical gallery or a serene digital sanctuary. Invisible UI that steps back to let the saved content shine.

bento_grid.inbox: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8

surface_styles.card: bg-white border border-[#EAE8E3] rounded-2xl shadow-sm transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden
surface_styles.glass_header: bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#EAE8E3] sticky top-0 z-50

url_input.style: w-full text-xl md:text-2xl p-6 md:p-8 bg-white border border-[#EAE8E3] rounded-full shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] focus:border-[#C36B58] focus:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(195,107,88,0.1)] outline-none transition-all duration-300
url_input.button: absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 bg-[#C36B58] text-[#FDFBF7] p-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#B25F4D] transition-colors

tags.style: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-medium bg-[#F5F3ED] text-[#7A7873] border border-[#EAE8E3]

buttons.primary: bg-[#C36B58] text-[#FDFBF7] rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#B25F4D] transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(195,107,88,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_4px_15px_rgba(195,107,88,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-[#EAE8E3] text-[#1C1C1A] rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#F5F3ED] transition-colors
buttons.icon: p-3 rounded-full bg-white border border-[#EAE8E3] hover:bg-[#F5F3ED] text-[#7A7873] hover:text-[#1C1C1A] transition-colors shadow-sm

empty_state.style: flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 md:py-32 text-center px-6
empty_state.image_style: w-64 h-64 md:w-80 md:h-80 mb-10 object-contain drop-shadow-sm

motion_and_interactions.page_transition: framer-motion initial={opacity: 0, y: 10} animate={opacity: 1, y: 0} transition={{duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut'}}
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee with slow speed for processing status or category tags.

images.description: Abstract minimalist cards overlapping, warm sand and off-white. Use as subtle background overlay in hero or empty state if needed.
Bonsai tree in minimalist pot, represents calm and empty inbox. Ideal for 0-state inbox screen.
Abstract sage green and terracotta video placeholder. Use when Instagram/YouTube thumbnails fail to load.
Clean minimalist profile avatar for Auth/Settings.
Alternative clean profile avatar for Auth/Settings.

technical_instructions_for_main_agent: 2. SHADCN CUSTOMIZATION: DO NOT use default Vercel-like Shadcn styles. Override Card component to use `bg-white border border-[#EAE8E3] rounded-2xl`, with NO default shadows. Only add shadows on hover.

3. LAYOUT: For the Home/Inbox feed, use a masonry or dense bento grid (`grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4`). Short-form video thumbnails (Reels/Shorts) are vertical (9:16), so use `aspect-[9/16]` for media containers within cards to prevent cropping or awkward scaling.
4. URL INPUT: Make the main URL input visually dominant at the top of the feed—large, rounded-full, floating, resembling a master search bar.
5. MAP VIEW: Use Mapbox GL or similar. Strip the map to a minimalist light theme (e.g., Mapbox Light or Monochrome) to match the #FDFBF7 page background.
6. TESTING: All interactive elements, links, buttons, and forms MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='save-url-button'`).
7. CONTRAST: Ensure text placed over thumbnails has a gradient overlay (e.g., `bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent`) at the bottom to maintain high APCA/WCAG contrast ratios.
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Add `focus-visible:ring-[#C36B58]` to all interactive items. Use aria-labels for icon buttons.
9. EMPTY STATES: The provided 'empty_state' bonsai image MUST be used in the inbox if there are no items saved yet.
